---
title: "Changing The Display Density"
---

Change the display density of the Hyland Capture application to adjust the spacing between such elements as text, fields, and buttons.

To change the display density:

1.  Open the Hyland Capture application and log in (see Opening the Hyland Capture Application).
2.  Select the user menu icon in the upper-right corner of the interface to expand the user menu drop-down list.   ![](data:image/gif;base64,)
3.  Select Settings.
4.  Select General.
5.  Select the Density drop-down list and select from the following options:

| Option | Description |
| --- | --- |
| Default | Default displays elements on the screen such as content lists, form fields, buttons, etc. with a default amount of spacing between elements. |
| Comfortable | Comfortable displays elements on the screen with a medium amount of spacing between elements. For example, items are displayed closer together and with less space between them than the Default option. |
| Compact | Compact displays elements on the screen with a minimal amount of spacing between elements. For example, items are displayed closer together and with a minimal amount of space between them. |
